description: User taps microphone. AVFoundation records audio via AVCaptureSession/AVCaptureAudioDataOutput. Audio streamed via WebSocket to HA server Assist Pipeline. Raw PCM audio at 16kHz sample rate.

flow_steps.details: User taps microphone button in Assist UI.
AVCaptureSession starts with microphone input device.

flow_steps.code: private func setupAudioRecorder() { let audioSession = AVAudioSession.sharedInstance(); try audioSession.setCategory(.record); captureSession.addInput(audioInput); captureSession.addOutput(audioOutput) }
flow_steps.details: AVAudioSession configured for recording. AVCaptureAudioDataOutput set up with 16kHz preferred sample rate. AVCaptureDeviceInput for microphone.

flow_steps.code: func captureOutput(_:, didOutput sampleBuffer:, from:) -> Void { delegate?.didOutputSample(data: data) }
flow_steps.details: Raw audio PCM sample buffers captured from microphone and forwarded to ViewModel.
Audio data streamed via WebSocket to HA server Assist Pipeline for STT and intent processing.
End-of-audio signal sent to server; server processes complete utterance.
TTS audio response received from HA server and played locally via AudioPlayer.
